warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan and Western Sabah and Labuan until 9:00PM; Monday, 29 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan sehingga 9:00 malam; Isnin, 29 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Straits of Melaka, eastern part of Samui, Tioman, western part of Condore and northwestern part of Bunguran until 9:00PM; Monday, 29 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka, timur Samui, Tioman, barat Condore dan barat laut Bunguran sehingga 9:00 malam; Isnin, 29 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang within the period of Tuesday, 30 June 2026 until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang dalam tempoh Selasa, 30 Jun 2026 sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Terengganu  (Hulu Terengganu, Marang, Dungun and Kemaman);  Pahang  (Raub, Jerantut, Temerloh, Maran, Kuantan, Bera, Pekan and Rompin);  Johor  (Tangkak, Segamat, Muar, Batu Pahat, Kluang, Mersing, Kulai and Johor Bahru);  Sarawak:  Kapit (Bukit Mabong and Belaga), Miri (Telang Usan and Marudi) and Limbang; and  Sabah:  Interior (Nabawan and Keningau) and Sandakan (Telupid, Beluran and Sandakan) until 9:00PM; Monday, 29 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Terengganu  (Hulu Terengganu, Marang, Dungun dan Kemaman);  Pahang  (Raub, Jerantut, Temerloh, Maran, Kuantan, Bera, Pekan dan Rompin);  Johor  (Tangkak, Segamat, Muar, Batu Pahat, Kluang, Mersing, Kulai dan Johor Bahru);  Sarawak:  Kapit (Bukit Mabong dan Belaga), Miri (Telang Usan dan Marudi) dan Limbang; dan  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Nabawan dan Keningau) dan Sandakan (Telupid, Beluran dan Sandakan) sehingga 9:00 malam; Isnin, 29 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
